assumptions: This slice covers the Domain Analysis page only, not the value detail page or export flows.
We should keep the current domain analysis numbers and formulas unchanged while changing how they are computed and surfaced.
Cached results should be shown by default when present, and the page should explain freshness in plain language.
The background refresh should run both when the page detects stale or missing data and when new run analysis finishes.
discovery.summary: Requirements were clear enough to proceed without extra discovery questions. Proceeding with explicit assumptions about scope, unchanged math, and a hybrid cache-refresh model.
non_goals: Do not change score formulas or domain-analysis semantics in this slice.
acceptance_criteria: A background refresh can be triggered after page load and after new run analysis completes without duplicate job storms.

delivery.summary: Shipped the hybrid domain-analysis freshness fix using the shared snapshot store, background refresh jobs, and a visible cached/fresh UI state.
